name: RED ROBIN GOURMET BURGERS INC
summary: PART I Overview Red Robin Gourmet Burgers,Inc., a Delaware corporation, is the parent company for Red Robin International, Inc., a Nevada corporation, that, together with its subsidiaries, primarily operates, franchises, and develops casual dining restaurantsin North America famous for serving more than 20 craveable, high-quality burgers with Bottomless Steak Fries and sides in a fun environment welcoming to guests of all ages.
